heading: This Afternoon
text: Chance of sprinkles or drizzle, mainly over high terrain.
temperature: Upper 30s to mid 40s, except 50s to around 60 southeast

heading: Tonight
text: Chance of rain far south, or a wintry mix in the southern Greens.

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of rain or mix in the south, spreading north to around Route 2.

heading: Friday
text: Chance of showers, maybe some early mix east of the Greens.
